Items.Title: Egypt boss' explosive interview over 'unfair' ref as 'fixed' World Cup accusation launched
Items.Description: Egypt manager Hossam Hassan and forward Mostafa Ziko were unhappy after their defeat to Argentina in the World Cup.
Items.Author: Daniel Orme,Mark Wakefield

Items.Title: Lionel Messi reveals why he broke down in tears after Argentina win World C

Items.Title: Egypt fume at 'injustice' and make Messi favouritism claims after exit
Items.Description: BBC Sport unpicks a game that will go down in World Cup history for featuring a team who were two goals down so late on, but who went on to win without needing extra time.
